sync.waitMessage: Please wait a moment while we prepare our book collection for you.
sync.internetRequiredMessage: An internet connection is required for the initial setup.
sync.failedMessage: Failed to sync data. Please try again.
sync.initialDownloadMessage: Welcome to Sicerdas! Your book database is currently empty. Download the content now (~500KB) to start your journey offline.
sync.successMessage: Success! {count} books added to your database.

settingsResetLibraryDescription: Delete local book metadata and sync history to redownload the latest data. This will not delete your downloaded book files.
settingsResetLibraryConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset and redownload the book database?
emptyStateFilterDescription: Try clearing the search query or active filters to see all books.
emptyStateDefaultDescription: Your collection is empty. Go ahead and download some books!

download.failedNoUrl: Could not retrieve the book URL from server.

delete.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}" from local storage?
delete.confirmPrefix: Are you sure you want to delete
